gist.headline: X-Ray Vision for Repos
gist.blurb: Reporay just joined the greenhouse! It's an AI-powered GitHub repository analyzer that gives you instant insights into tech stacks and architecture just by pasting a URL.
gist.summary: Added Reporay, an AI-powered GitHub repository analyzer, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Reporay in our app directory to easily generate smart summaries and architectural insights from any GitHub repository URL.
gist.visual_concept: Reporay is a repository analyzer, suggesting themes of scanning, x-rays, or magnifying glasses looking at code. The scene should feature Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot examining a glowing folder or code block, revealing its inner structure.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot examining a glowing digital folder with a magnifying glass. The folder emits a soft lime green (#ecf874) light, revealing tiny 8-bit code blocks inside like an x-ray. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot examining a glowing digital folder with a magnifying glass. The folder emits a soft lime green (#ecf874) light, revealing tiny 8-bit code blocks inside like an x-ray. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
